images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a dim, empty museum hall at night, glowing dashboard screens and network diagrams mounted like framed exhibits behind glass along the walls, a single lone engineer silhouette standing in the center looking up at them, cold light spilling from the screens. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent lines only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition, no text or logos.
